title: A2AAgentCard
description: A2A v1.0 Agent Card wire document — the EXTERNAL projection of a registry agent card (ADR-0006). Produced only by the Registry's strict allowlist translation (toA2ACard): every exported field is opted IN; internal governance fields (tool bindings, scopes, model classes, data classification, compensators, eval baselines, tenants, lifecycle) are never present. signatures[] carry detached JWS (RFC 7797) by the registry signing key, verifiable against the public JWKS.

protocolVersion.description: A2A protocol version this card conforms to (e.g. 1.0).

url.description: Public service endpoint for this agent at the platform edge. Documented-inert in v0: card export ships before the inbound execution surface.

organization.description: Platform organization constant — never the internal owning team.

version.description: Semver of the exported agent version's capability contract.

capabilities.description: A2A optional-feature flags; all false in v0 exports.

securitySchemes.description: How an EXTERNAL consumer authenticates to the platform edge (e.g. oauth2 client credentials at the platform token endpoint). Never internal scope vocabulary.

security.description: Security requirements referencing securitySchemes by name.

signatures.description: Detached JWS signatures (RFC 7797, b64=false) over the JCS-canonicalized card sans signatures, by the registry signing key.

id.description: Capability name (the platform's namespaced action, e.g. knowledge.search).

tags.description: Governance hints (e.g. the risk class) — informational for consumers.

examples.description: Example inputs, serialized; drawn from the manifest's discovery examples.

protected.description: Base64url-encoded protected JWS header ({alg, kid, b64:false, crit:[b64]}).

signature.description: Base64url-encoded JWS signature over the detached canonical payload.
